pages.text: $(item)Spirit Ore$() is a resource found deep underground in large veins. It must be mined with an $(bold)Iron Pickaxe$() or better to drop Spirit Stones$().

$(bold)Spirit Ore Veins$() generate between Y=0 and Y=-100 . Each vein is very large, containing 200-250 ore blocks.$(br2)Mining through a vein may reveal Spirit Vein Centers.$(br2)Use a Spirit Map or $(bold)/locate poi magic_ritual_mod:spirit_vein_center$() command to find nearby veins.
